name: Lemon Sauce with Variations
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Gradually stir in hot water until smooth.
3. Bring to a boil and cook for 15 minutes, stirring frequently until thickened and clear.
4. Stir in the lemon rind, juice, and butter.
Variations:
- Golden Lemon Sauce: Stir in an egg yolk that has been slightly beaten before adding lemon juice and butter. Cook for 1 minute while stirring constantly.
- Fruit Sauce: Substitute hot fruit juice for water, reduce lemon juice to 1 tablespoon, omit the lemon rind, and adjust sugar as needed based on the sweetness of the juice. Add diced fruit if desired (e.g., with Blanc Mange or Cottage Pudding).
- Orange Sauce: Reduce water to 3/4 cup and lemon juice to 1 tablespoon. Substitute grated orange for lemon rind, add 1/4 cup orange juice, and a beaten egg yolk for richness.
- Lemon Coconut Sauce: Add brown sugar, omit the lemon rind, increase lemon juice to 1/4 cup, and stir in shredded coconut before serving.
Notes:
I have found that having some good basic sauces will add so much flavor to different desserts, meats, and other foods. I LOVE lemons in many ways and enjoy their taste greatly.
